word: G1881 - ἐπανίσταμαι - epanístamai - ep-an-is'-tam-ahee - Rise up against

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Rise up against
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to cause to rise up against, to raise up against
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Middle voice from G1909 and G450; to stand up on, that is, (figuratively) to attack: - rise up against.
